prompt: Create a cinematic travel poster photograph of Lisbon at night, showing a steep narrow old European street descending into the distance with wet cobblestones and two parallel tram rails curving down the hill. The viewpoint is from the upper part of the street, looking downhill between tall aged buildings with balconies, barred windows, textured plaster walls, stone doorways, and warm glowing street lamps. The right foreground has a bright vintage wall lantern above a doorway, climbing plants catching golden light, and a small potted plant near the curb. The background fades into deep blue night with soft bokeh city lights and a blurred hilltop landmark. Use shallow depth of field, moody cinematic color grading, strong contrast between warm amber lamps and cool navy shadows, glossy reflections on the rails and stones, realistic photography, 16:9 horizontal composition. Add elegant overlaid typography in the lower-left and center-left: exactly 3 text elements reading Lisbon in very large white handwritten brush script, BEAUTIFUL NIGHTS in small uppercase gold serif lettering beneath it, and UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES in wider-spaced uppercase gold serif lettering below. Add exactly 3 decorative elements under the subtitles: one thin gold horizontal line on the left, one small gold four-petal fleur-de-lis ornament in the center, and one thin gold horizontal line on the right. Keep the typography crisp and integrated like a luxury travel postcard; no people, no vehicles in the foreground, no extra text, no watermark.
